data_sources_used.notes: City-level directories listing independent community pharmacies that use the PioneerRx / RxLocal patient-app platform. Each row was confirmed to exist on RxLocal at the URL given.
AmerisourceBergen-owned banner network; every member is an independently owned community pharmacy. Confirmed via individual store-detail pages.
McKesson banner network; every member is an independently owned community pharmacy.

exclusion_filters_applied: Chain retail (CVS, Walgreens, Walmart, HEB, Kroger, Tom Thumb, Target/CVS, Costco, Sam's Club, Brookshire's, Albertsons, Randalls)
Hospital outpatient pharmacies (UTSW, UT Southwestern, Cook Children's, CHRISTUS, Memorial Hermann, Methodist, Baylor Scott & White, Scottish Rite, University Medical Center)
Compounding-only operations identified by name (e.g., 'X Compounding Pharmacy' with no retail signal)
Specialty-only pharmacies (e.g., 'X Specialty Pharmacy' that does not appear to do walk-in retail)
_meta.independence_verification_method: Each business cross-checked against: (a) chain-brand exclusion list, (b) RxLocal/Good Neighbor/Health Mart membership as positive evidence of locally-owned status, (c) name pattern (family name, neighborhood, community-oriented branding), (d) absence of hospital/health-system parent. Independents identified via banner program are explicitly flagged in banner_program field.
limitations: license_number, license_issue_date, and license_holder_name (PharmD-in-Charge) were NOT captured: the Texas State Board of Pharmacy license search at pharmacy.texas.gov/dbsearch/ is a session-based ASP.NET form that returned redirect/empty responses to non-interactive fetches. These fields are populated as null and should be enriched in a downstream pass by a Playwright-driven scraper or by hitting the NCPDP/NPI registry.

websites were NOT captured for most rows: many independents do not maintain a dedicated domain (they rent the RxLocal/mygnp.com microsite). website field is null when no independent domain was found; falsy-but-present URLs are not invented.

Independence was inferred from banner membership and name pattern. A handful of edge cases (e.g., a multi-store independent like Saenz Medical with 4 McAllen stores, or the Carvajal chain with 5 San Antonio stores) are INCLUDED because they remain owner-operated under one PharmD, which is exactly the targeting profile.
